=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
04/19/03	
Austin, Texas
The Backyard

lineage and taper: no info 
great sound


1 intro 
2 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano)
3 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel)
4 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano)
5 Saving Grace (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel)
6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano)
7 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel)
8 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp and electric guitar)
9 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel)
10 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano)


11 Lay, Lady, Lay (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel)
12 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass)
13 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar)
14 Standing In The Doorway (Bob on piano)
15 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass)

(encore)
16 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano)
17 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 


Concert # 1503 of The Never-Ending Tour. Second concert of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 13.
Second concert with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 4. 6, 8, 10 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
6 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7, 8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
8 acoustic with the band.
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar)
===================
